arts.ttl: PSG to Re-Release Iconic 2001-02 Ronaldinho Kit
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain is set to reissue one of their most iconic kits—the 2001-02 home jersey famously worn by Ronaldinho during his debut season in Europe.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Boosted as Bayern Munich Unwilling to Spend £50M on PSG-Linked Ace
arts.sum: The transfer race for Eintracht Frankfurt’s Omar Marmoush is heating up as the 25-year-old continues to shine in the Bundesliga this season. However, one team has made it clear they won’t be overpaying for the Egyptian international. arts.ttl: Video: Joao Neves Scores Stunning Volley Goal Against Toulouse
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain opened the scoring against Toulouse in the 35th minute thanks to a goal from midfielder João Neves on a volley shot off a fantastic assist from Achraf Hakimi. Hakimi, who is wearing the captain’s armband for this match, put in a quality cross that found an unmarked Neves and it was perfectly placed. arts.ttl: French soccer federation says it won't intervene in Mbappé vs. PSG dispute
arts.sum: PSG asked the federation to look into the call by the French league appeals commission last month to uphold a decision ordering the club to pay Mbappé 55 million euros ($60 million). The league legal commission ruled in favor of Mbappé but PSG insisted it did not owe him money and appealed.

PSG have been told to pay Kylian Mbappe outstanding wages and bonuses of up to €55 million by the French Football Association (FFF) as the latest round in the dispute between the two parties fell in favour of the Real Madrid player. The first problems were made clear as far back as summer 2023, when Mbappe was excluded from PSG training and even missed the first match of the 2023/24 campaign because of the issue.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Set to Rival West Ham for PSG’s £60M-Rated Summer Target
arts.sum: As the summer transfer window closed, Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in Atalanta forward Ademola Lookman, and recent reports suggest they might reignite their pursuit in January. arts.ttl: Toulouse predicted XI v PSG: Rasmus Nicolaisen out, Charlie Cresswell to start
arts.sum: Suffering with an ankle injury, centre-back Rasmus Nicolaisen is the major absentee for Toulouse FC as they travel to the Parc des Princes to take on Ligue 1 leaders Paris…
